_comment: Gems for HOLLOWFANE v0.8.0 sockets system (spec §4.4 — 5 types × 5 quality tiers at v1.0). Spike subset: 3 types × 1 tier. Gems are inventory-only items (slot=gem) that the future Socket Gem UI inserts into items with sockets. v0.8.0 ships the data model + drop-table integration; the actual socket UI is deferred to Week 9, so gems currently land in inventory but cannot yet be installed.
